expectations.text: Strips YAML front matter before writing to plan mode
expectations.evidence: Plan mode content has no YAML front matter

expectations.text: Adds metadata comment with original path and status: <!-- project-plan-source: plans/add-auth.md, status: draft -->
expectations.evidence: First line is <!-- project-plan-source: plans/add-auth.md, status: draft -->

expectations.text: Displays the plan content to the user (without metadata comment)
expectations.evidence: Response shows plan content without the HTML comment

expectations.text: Keeps the existing top-level heading '# Add Authentication'
expectations.evidence: Heading is # Add Authentication in plan mode content
